min_entry_age.source_quote: Entry age - adult (18 - 65 years) and child (03 months to 26 years)

max_entry_age.source_quote: Entry age - adult (18 - 65 years) and child (03 months to 26 years)

min_child_entry_age.source_quote: Entry age - adult (18 - 65 years) and child (03 months to 26 years)

grace_period.source_quote: The grace period for payment of the premium for all types of insurance policies shall be, fifteen days where premium payment mode is monthly and thirty days in all other cases.

free_look_period.source_quote: free look period of 30 days beginning from the date of receipt of policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-Existing Disease(PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with insurer.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: listed Conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of first 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with us.

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: 539+ day care procedures and cashless hospitalisation across India

network_hospital_count.source_note: 13,500+ Cashless Hospitals ('Why Chola MS' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: A Co-payment of 20% shall be applied on each and every admissible claim in case of treatment taken in a hospital from Tier 1 location

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment refers to the medical and / or hospitalization treatments given under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems

newborn_coverage.source_quote: This policy will pay for the Inpatient hospitalisation medical expenses incurred for the New Born Baby from Day one till policy expiry date mentioned in the policy schedule subject to a limit of 10% of Sum Insured subject to a maximum of Rs.50,000/- whichever is less within Mother’s Sum Insured

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: This policy will pay for medical expenses incurred on a legal Organ Donor’s treatment for the harvesting of the organ donated.

restoration_benefit.source_quote: This policy will provide for a 100% restoration of Sum Insured during that policy year, provided that: a. The Sum Insured and earned Cumulative Bonus is insufficient or exhausted as a result of previous claims during the policy year. b.

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalisation means medical treatment for an illness/disease/injury which in the normal course would require care and treatment at a hospital but is actually taken while confined at home under any of the following circumstances: a.

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: Health Checkup Once in two claim free years upto defined limits In case of Family floater policy, the benefits shown in the table above will represent our maximum liability for any and all claims made by Insured person(s) during the policy period. 4.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility means a facility extended by the Insurer to the insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the insured

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus 10% - 50% Reduction in Cumulative Bonus 10%

geographic_coverage.source_quote: make payment within India and in Indian Rupees only for medical services or procedures rendered in or undertaken within India.

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote: on individual sum insured basis • Each person covered will have an independent sum insured limit within the same policy

room_rent_capping.value: No room limit for Sum Insured above Rs.2 Lakhs (Rs.2000/day sub-limit for Rs.50k/1L/2L)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent limits - Upto Rs.2000/- per day for Sum Insured Rs.50,000/-, Rs.1 Lakh & Rs. 2 Lakhs. - No Room limit for Sum Insured above Rs.2 Lakhs

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus 10% - 50% Reduction in Cumulative Bonus 10%
